name: SAP Enterprise (DACH)
description: Large enterprises running SAP with 500+ employees in DACH facing S/4HANA migration deadlines and cloud-first ERP transformation.

tam.description: Global SAP cloud migration and managed SAP services
tam.source: LLM estimate based on SAP ecosystem sizing; SAP has 400K+ customers globally, S/4HANA migration wave drives EUR 18B+ in services

sam.description: DACH SAP-on-cloud migration, hosting, and managed operations
sam.source: LLM estimate: DACH is SAP's home market with ~30K SAP customers in DE alone; managed SAP services ~EUR 3.8B addressable

som.description: 70 SAP enterprise accounts x EUR 4M average ACV over 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up estimate: T-Systems manages 850K SAP users; targeting 70 new cloud migration/hosting wins at EUR 4M blended ACV
